weight.rangeError: Weight must be between 0.5 and 25 kg
length.rangeError: Length must be between 30 and 120 cm
time.notFuture: Time cannot be in the future
chip.olderHint: For older entries, edit the previous day's entries via the Mission Log
humour.feedPort.0: BRAVO-1 latched on the port boom — boom time begins.
humour.feedPort.2: Tanker BRAVO-1 cleared port boom. Throttle to soft.
humour.feedPort.3: Refuel probe contact — port. Steady on.
humour.feedPort.4: Port boom engaged. Feeding station nominal.
humour.feedPort.5: BRAVO-1 vectored to port tit. Smooth approach.
humour.feedPort.6: Mass transfer initiated, port-side. All gauges green.
humour.feedPort.7: Port boom contact, hard dock. Gulping commenced.
humour.feedPort.8: Contact, port. Loadmaster confirms green light.
humour.feedPort.9: Port-side flow stable. Hold this heading.
humour.feedStarboard.0: BRAVO-1 latched on the starboard boom — boom time begins.
humour.feedStarboard.2: Tanker BRAVO-1 cleared starboard boom. Throttle to soft.
humour.feedStarboard.3: Refuel probe contact — starboard. Steady on.
humour.feedStarboard.4: Starboard boom engaged. Feeding station nominal.
humour.feedStarboard.5: BRAVO-1 vectored to starboard tit. Smooth approach.
humour.feedStarboard.6: Mass transfer initiated, starboard-side. All gauges green.
humour.feedStarboard.7: Starboard boom contact, hard dock. Gulping commenced.
humour.feedStarboard.8: Contact, starboard. Loadmaster confirms green light.
humour.feedStarboard.9: Starboard-side flow stable. Hold this heading.
humour.wet.1: Wet payload released. Weight reduction noted.
humour.wet.2: Bay doors opened — clear separation, no tumbling.
humour.wet.4: JETTISON ack — fuel state down by one diaper.
humour.wet.5: Wet bay venting complete. Fresh manifold installed.
humour.wet.7: Cargo bay 1 cleared. Centre of gravity holds.
humour.wet.8: Wet jettison logged. No anomaly observed.
humour.wet.9: JETTISON COMPLETE — boom retracted to stow.
humour.dirty.0: ORDNANCE RELEASED — direct hit, area secure.
humour.dirty.2: Heavy ordnance dropped. Crew acknowledges aroma.
humour.dirty.3: BDA: target area requires a wet jettison follow-up.
humour.dirty.4: Free-fall complete. No collateral on the loadmaster.
humour.dirty.5: Hardened payload released. Bay vents engaged.
humour.dirty.6: ORDNANCE clear of the airframe. Re-arm cycle pending.
humour.dirty.7: Significant ordnance event — log to MISSION LOG.
humour.dirty.8: Manifest updated: one heavy round expended.
humour.weight.0: Manifest updated — gross weight on the books.
humour.weight.2: BRAVO-1 mass to scale. Trim adjusted.
humour.weight.3: New manifest entry — weight and length recorded.
humour.weight.4: Cargo data refreshed. Loadmaster signs off.
humour.weight.5: Weight bay cleared, length tape stowed.
humour.weight.6: Manifest amended — keep this for the squadron flight surgeon.
humour.weight.8: Mass and dimensions captured. Centre of gravity holds.
humour.weight.9: Manifest update: gross weight on the books, length on the chart.
lastContact.empty.themed: NO CONTACT YET — Tap CONTACT to log the first feed
lastContact.empty.plain: No feeding logged yet — tap a feed action to start
vector.overdue: DUE NOW — last vector window has closed
vector.unlock.dirty: {n} more ordnance releases to unlock vector
vector.stale: low confidence — data may be stale; consider importing missing entries
log.empty: Mission log is empty — tap an action on the loadmaster station to begin.
multitab.banner: Your data was updated in another tab.
settings.factoryReset.subLabel: Erase all data on this device
csv.export.blocked: Your browser blocked the download — open this app in Safari or Chrome to export.
csv.import.preview.title: Import preview
csv.import.malformed: File could not be read — please verify it is a valid CSV exported by aar-deploy or filled from the template.
csv.import.tzWarning: Some rows had no timezone — assumed local
preflight.title: PRE-FLIGHT CHECKLIST
preflight.welcome: Welcome aboard, Loadmaster. BRAVO-1 is on the apron.
preflight.item1.themed: 1. Tap CONTACT — PORT or CONTACT — STARBOARD to log a feed.
preflight.item1.plain: 1. Tap Feed (left) or Feed (right) to log a feed.
preflight.item2.themed: 2. Tap JETTISONED for a wet diaper, ORDNANCE RELEASED for a dirty diaper.
preflight.item2.plain: 2. Tap Wet diaper or Dirty diaper to log it.
preflight.item3.themed: 3. Use the back-date chip if the event happened a few minutes ago.
preflight.item3.plain: 3. Use the back-date chip if the event happened a few minutes ago.
preflight.item4.themed: 4. Tap WEIGHT & BALANCE to log a weigh-in.
preflight.item4.plain: 4. Tap Weight + length to log a weigh-in.
preflight.item5.themed: 5. Tap MANIFEST EXPORT in Settings every few days to back up your data.
preflight.item5.plain: 5. Tap Import in Settings every few days to back up your data.
backup.overdue.banner: BACKUP OVERDUE — export a CSV soon to avoid losing data to browser cleanup.
backup.first.banner: FIRST BACKUP — you've logged 10 events. Export a CSV now to protect against browser cleanup.
deleteLast.confirm.title: Remove the last entry: {type} at {time}? This cannot be undone.
factoryReset.step1.title: FACTORY RESET — Step 1 of 2
factoryReset.step1.body: This will erase every event, milestone, and setting on this device.
factoryReset.step2.title: Type DELETE to confirm
factoryReset.failed: Reset failed — please close all aar-deploy tabs and try again.
milestone.longestGap.plain: New longest gap between feeds: {n} minutes
milestone.firstQuietNight.plain: First quiet night — 6 hours with no feeds
relay.title: COMMS RELAY
relay.empty: Nothing to relay in the last {n} days.
relay.overflow: Last {n} days is too much for a share-link — fall back to CSV?
relay.privacy.title: Privacy warning
relay.privacy.body: This link contains BRAVO-1's data — wet/dirty diapers, feedings, weights. Anyone who receives or sees this link can read the data. Forward only to people you trust. WhatsApp/iMessage backups are not end-to-end encrypted by default.
emcon.banner: EMCON — displaying imported data. Local data is preserved until you confirm.
share.corrupt.title: Shared link could not be opened
share.corrupt.bodyTooLarge: The shared link is corrupted or incomplete and cannot be opened. Please ask the sender to share again.
share.corrupt.decodeFailed: The shared link is corrupted or incomplete and cannot be opened. Please ask the sender to share again.
share.corrupt.invalidJson: The shared link is corrupted or incomplete and cannot be opened. Please ask the sender to share again.
share.corrupt.invalidSchema: The shared link is corrupted or incomplete and cannot be opened. Please ask the sender to share again.
share.schemaVersionTooNew: This link was made by a newer version of aar-deploy. Please update your app, then ask the sender to share again.
report.title: Pediatrician Report
report.subject: BRAVO-1
report.guardSetVisit: Set a last-visit date to use this window
report.empty: No data in the selected window.
storage.quotaExceeded.log: This device's storage is full — your last log was kept in memory. Export now to avoid losing data.
storage.quotaExceeded.settings: This device's storage is full — your settings change was kept in memory only.
storage.unavailable: Storage unavailable — your data will not be saved between sessions. For full functionality, enable localStorage in your browser settings.
storage.replaceFailed: Could not commit the imported data — your previous data is intact. Please try again.
boot.error: Could not start aar-deploy. Please reload the page.
